pages.title: How to Level Up
pages.text: You gain a $(b)Level Up$() each time you defeat a $(b)Biome Boss$() (the final level of each biome).$(br2)Each level grants $(b)1 Stat Point$() that you can allocate to any stat of your choice. Choose wisely - your build defines your playstyle!

pages.title: Emeralds
pages.text: Winning any combat level earns $(b)Emeralds$(). The amount scales with biome difficulty:$(br)$(li)Base: 1 + biome_tier/3$(br)$(li)Boss bonus: +3 emeralds$(br2)Spend emeralds at the $(b)Wandering Trader$() between levels to buy weapons, armor, and supplies!
